<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Garden Sympathy](21-garden-sympathy.jpg)

Closer to a bouquet for the home than a formal funeral arrangement — best when sent to a family member's house in the days after a death, rather than to the chapel itself. White hydrangea, garden roses, eucalyptus.

## What's in it

- White hydrangea
- Garden roses
- Lisianthus
- Seasonal foliage

## Care

Hydrangeas drink heavily — top up water daily and they'll last 7+ days.
